reviews.review_description: This game can be fun but i find that hitting the balls are very sensitive and you get slices alot, if you hit it nice and slow you can go 365 yrds and putting is annoying af

Its like the ball h
ase a mind of its own

Fun game, like all the game options, but when doing a round of golf I wish they would use a button or the trigger button instead of a white block because I hit the ball when I'm not ready or I have to tap the white block then swing. All in all a great game.

It’s a very good game love the concept and the driving range but if you could drive the golf carts around and if the graphics were a little a lot better. I think it could be one of the best games I’ve ever played on VR.

I play golf in real life but I live in the south and it gets really hot here so I have been playing this game for the last to days and yet I had to redo my entire swing because it would hit the ball at my climax on my swing and the ball goes where ever it wants after I hit it.
its a great game just wish i could golf the courses with my friends and wish there were more courses

I really enjoy the game. The courses are good and the graphic aren’t to horrible. But my only problem with it is the golf balls hit box is far to bag and I find myself hitting the ball backwards when I swing the golf club

developer_response.body:
I'm sorry ... 
I'll do my best ...

reviews.review_title: Not too bad, just one major problem...
reviews.review_description: This game seems fun, however, due to me being lefty, I don't even have the chance to play. Now, unless I'm blind and didn't see the option, please add an option for lefties.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review.
We are looking into adding a feature to support left-handed users. We hope to support this within the next few months.

reviews.review_title: Has a ways to go, but could be good
reviews.review_description:
I've had this game for a while now and the developers have really added a lot. There are a lot of issues with the interface still and the ball physics need major work but the full course looks nice and if they can shore up the game play a bit, it could be a really good game.

The biggest issue I had today is the that games are not working. No ball showed up on the tee in the balloons game so we were unable to play that. 

We switched over to the buildings game and there was a ball on the tee but we were unable to activate it by pressing any of the buttons or touching the white block. 

Moved on to the Greenie game and again, there was no ball and no matter what we tried, we could not get one to appear. There is a "pinfix" option ijn that game that is unexplained and clicking it didn't do anything.

Played a few holes on one of the courses and every shot I hit was going straight left or right. There is no way to know the lie you are in and no marking on the ball so you can set yourself up. Not having feet in VR requires some method of determining where you are facing. I was unable to hit anything straight off the tee and while I'm not a pro golfer, straight tee shots are something I can certainly do.

Putting needs a ton of work. You can slam the ball and it will start off fast but slow very quickly and only go a few feet. 

It's very rough but could turn into a good game at some point. The developers are adding a lot so hopefully it will improve.

It needs more explanation on how to play: activating the ball, etc. because you're just kind of left to figure everything out.

There is a preset for the Deadeye controller in this game and you are able to make X, Y and Z club adjustments, but I found that no matter the settings, this big hand is in your way and blocks your view when trying to putt. It completely blocks your view of the ball. That definitely needs to be removed or at least have a toggle to not show the hand as it's quite obstructive.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much.
These comments are very helpful!

We will consider all the points you have raised.

Please note that we have not been able to reproduce the non-working part in our environment. If possible, we would appreciate it if you could tell us what environment you are using (Quest1or2orRift?).

PinFix in the Greenie game is a function that randomly moves the pin position.
I would like to correct the wording as it is not clear.

As for adjusting the putt, we are trying various things, but it is not working. We are planning to radically revise the physics engine, including the distance of each club.

We plan to add a mechanism to the round mode alignment to show the orientation of the club.

Also, I did not notice that the hands get in the way when putting. We will work on making it disappear.

Thank you very much. We will use this information to improve this application.
We look forward to hearing from you again after the improvement.

reviews.review_description: It's pretty good for a free golf game
it’s a good game and fun when waiting for friends to get on but one thing i would like added is a option to reset the shot your on even if the ball is still in the air

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing!
We will definitely incorporate your feedback into our next improvements. We would like to make it possible to press the "next shot" button even while the ball is flying.

reviews.review_description: it’s what you get for free.

developer_response.body: We apologize for the many glitches, such as the behavior of the ball. We are working hard to develop a paid version.

reviews.review_description: This game is free and it took forever to find a free golf game like this

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much.
I am really encouraged by the opinions of those who use it.

reviews.review_description: Fun game with good mechanics such as having a slice or a hook but distances are off by a lot I usually drive 220-250 on a course but this is saying I'm driving over 500 yards

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your input.
We are aware that there are events where distances vary greatly from person to person. We are still making adjustments, but in the end we want to keep the error within a sensible range for everyone, and our goal is to create a precise golf simulator that can be used in VR.

reviews.review_description:
Selection of clubs, from driver to six-nine irons, putter.

Swing mechanics and ball flight seem realistic, and comparable to TopGolf.  Maybe a bit more realistic in terms of distances.  Less robust overall, however. 

Feature to replay your swing is useful, but I find that it runs slow for me at times.

Overall a useful and solid tool, especially for free!

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much.
This feedback is very encouraging.
In the future, we will put more effort into adjusting the numbers and strive to make the simulator more realistic.
